description_long: This is a pair of high-top canvas sneakers, predominantly black with white rubber toe caps and midsoles. The shoes feature a classic design with white laces threaded through metal eyelets, and a visible circular patch on the inner ankle area, typical of Converse Chuck Taylor All Star shoes. The outsole is textured for grip, and the midsole has a horizontal stripe detail. The interior lining appears to be a muted greenish-gray fabric. The back of the shoes displays branding text on the heel tab. The overall construction suggests durability and comfort for urban walking.
description: A pair of black high-top canvas sneakers with white laces, rubber toe caps, and classic branding details. The shoes are designed for everyday urban wear and feature a sturdy, textured sole.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical lacing, white toe caps, and the high-top silhouette.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the circular ankle patch, metal eyelets, and the layered sole.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the heel branding, vertical stitching, and the open top with visible lining.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the ankle patch and the overall shoe profile.
attribute_logo: Circular patch on inner ankle, black and white, with text; rectangular text logo on heel tab.
